zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Brus於1283年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale40歲，母親Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick29歲。她和Sir William Carlyle至少有6個兒子。她去世於1323年9月22日在蘇格蘭洛-爾費亞享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Brus was born in 1283, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, was 40 and her mother, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, was 29. She had at least 6 sons with Sir William Carlyle. She died on 22 September 1323, in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Brus est née en 1283, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Sir William Carlyle. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1323, à Fearn, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Brus 1283 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale 40 und ihre Mutter Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick 29. Sie hatte mit Sir William Carlyle mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb am 22. September 1323 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Brus è nata il nel 1283 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Sir William Carlyle. Morì il 22 settembre 1323, nel Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Brusが1283年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleは40歳，母Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickは29歳であった。彼女はSir William Carlyleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1323年9月22日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアフエアルンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Brus(이)가 1283년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Sir William Carlyle(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 9월 22일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 피른에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Brus nasceu em 1283, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Sir William Carlyle. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1323, em Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Brus родилась в 1283 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Sir William Carlyle. Она умерла 22 сентября 1323 г. в местности фирн, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Brus nació en 1283, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Sir William Carlyle. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1323, en Fearn, Ross-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años.
